name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-5
title: spec invariant 13 (rbt- banned) not asserted by behavioural test
description: Spec invariant 13 declares rbt- is the banned legacy prefix. test-check-naming-no-rbt.py only checks check-naming.py source text. Add a test that drops an rbt-FOO file under fixture .claude/ and asserts check-naming.py exits non-zero with a VIOLATION mention.
